struct@(A,B) Pair {
  x: Int@A;
  y: Int@B;

  func@(A,B) exchange() Pair@(B,A) {
    return Pair@(B,A) {
      x: await B->A y,
      y: await A->B x
    };
  }
}

func@(A,B,C) foo() {
  let pair: Pair@(A,_) = Pair@(A,B) { x: 10, y: 20 };
  let p = pair.exchange;
}
---
E52 15:16: function of type `func@(A,_) exchange() struct@(_,A) Pair` is incomplete
